meta.name: MagnetaServiceFee — accept ownership (bsc)
meta.description: Second leg of Ownable2Step: Safe 0xC4c96aF54cdE078dc993d6948199b0AF8cD6717a accepts ownership of MagnetaServiceFee 0xc7E3fD8e44484af3595BA7C2e930582364d25C3B on bsc. Run AFTER deployServiceFee.ts (transferOwnership already done by deployer). Fees are OFF (opFee=0) until a later setOpFee.
